MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Kirk (petitioner) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kirk stated that he is considering hiring a paralegal or attorney for assistance. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to November 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)
